title: PseudoCode search overlay component with keyboard navigation
purpose: Provides a searchable overlay for pseudocode files with debounced search, keyboard navigation, and result highlighting.
module_context: Exports a default PseudoSearch component that manages search state, handles keyboard events, and renders search results with file paths, method names, and highlighted snippets.

steps.content: Remove the '.pseudo' file extension from the provided file path.
Return the resulting file stem.

methods.name: PseudoSearch
methods.normalized_params: ({ project, isOpen, onClose, onNavigate }: PseudoSearchProps): JSX.Element | null

steps.content: Initialize state for search query, results, highlighted index, and loading status.
Set up a debounced search function that executes after 200ms of inactivity.
Execute the debounced search whenever the query changes.
Handle keyboard navigation events for arrow keys, enter, and escape.
Listen for clicks outside the overlay to close the search.
Focus the search input when the overlay opens.
Render the search overlay with input field and results list when open.
Clear results and reset highlighted index if query is empty.
Set loading state to true before initiating search.
Call the search API with the project and search query.
Update results and reset highlighted index on successful search.
Handle errors by clearing results and resetting loading state.
Close the overlay if escape key is pressed.
Move highlighted index down if arrow down key is pressed.
Move highlighted index up if arrow up key is pressed.
Navigate to selected result if enter key is pressed.
Check if the click target is the overlay background.
Close the overlay if the click is on the overlay background.
